creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 249358
bmd-2.4.patch

I updated and released the new bmd version 2.4 to implement the requested features.
Please take a look at the release note in the following URL.

https://github.com/yuichiro-naito/bmd/releases/tag/2.4

Since this version, MANDIR has been changed to $(LOCALBASE)/share/man.
We no longer need to patch for MANDIR. I re-generated the rc.d/Makefile patch.
No functional change is intended for it.

The attached patch updates sysutils/bmd port.
Please apply to the Ports tree.
